parameters.formDescription: Fill in the fields to generate a personalized employee of the month certificate as PDF.

projectAdditionalFields.description: Employee of the Month certificates — created by n8n

additionalFields.description: Template with variable placeholders. Rendered via n8n with dynamic values.

parameters.content:
## Render a Saved Autype Document with Variable Overrides

This workflow shows how to render a **persistent Autype document** (created once in the Autype editor or via API) with **dynamic variable values** injected at render time.

Autype variables support multiple types:
- **String** — plain text, e.g. `{{recipientName}}`
- **Number** — numeric value, e.g. `{{EmployeeID}}`
- **Table** — tabular data with columns and rows
- **Image** — an image element with `src`, `width`/`height`

This example generates a personalized **Employee of the Month certificate** as PDF.

### How it works
1. **Certificate Form** — n8n form collects recipient name, award month, achievements (comma-separated), and an optional photo URL.
2. **Set Form Variables** — Maps form fields and sets the document ID.
3. **Get Document Variables** — Fetches the variable definitions from the saved template (optional, useful for debugging).
4. **Render Document with Variables** — Renders the saved document, injecting the form values as typed variables.

### Setup
1. Install **n8n-nodes-autype** via **Settings → Community Nodes**.
2. Get your API key at [app.autype.com](https://app.autype.com) → [API Keys](https://docs.autype.com/getting-started/editor/settings#api-keys).
3. Add an **Autype API** credential and update `YOUR_CREDENTIAL_ID` in each Autype node.
4. Run the **one-time setup** (see box on the right) to create the project and template document — then copy the returned document ID into `Set Form Variables`.

Note: Requires self-hosted n8n (community node).

## ONE-TIME SETUP — Run once, then disable

This section creates the **project** and **document template** in Autype via API. After running it once:
1. Copy the `id` from the **Create Document** output
2. Paste it into the `documentId` field in **Set Form Variables**
3. Disable or disconnect these two nodes — they are no longer needed

**Alternative:** Create the project and document manually in the Autype web editor at [app.autype.com](https://app.autype.com) — no API needed. Just copy the document ID from the URL.

### Form Trigger
Collects: recipient name, employee ID, award month, achievements (textarea → table), profile photo URL (→ image), signature URL (→ image). Submit to start the render.

### Get Variables (optional)
Fetches the variable schema from the saved document — shows which placeholders exist and their types.

### Render with Variables
Injects: `recipientName` (string), `EmployeeID` (number), `awardMonth` (string), `achivements` (table), `profilePhoto` (image), `Signature` (image) — renders PDF.
